features: Freshmatic refill for Air Wick auto spray gadgets
Bursts of fragrance to constantly freshen your home with 24/7 odour stop technology
Up to 70 days of continuous fragrance per refill at a minimum setting
No wet spray so you can enjoy more fragrance in the air and less on the floor
Air Wick Pure Freshmatic Max Soft Cotton releases bursts of fragrance to constantly freshen your home and neutralize odours
Lasts for up to 60 days per can based on the lowest fragrance intensity setting
description: Product Description Air Wick Pure Freshmatic Max Auto Sprays release bursts of continuous fresh fragrance so your home always smells welcoming. Just set the air freshener to your preferred fragrance intensity setting and enjoy while the Soft Cotton refill fragrances your home. With its improved formula with no added water, Air Wick Pure neutralises odours with no water fall down and diffuses a fresh a pleasant fragrance in your home. Enhance your home with the fresh scent of Soft Cotton. Directions Before inserting this aerosol refill, check that your automatic device switch is in the OFF position. Direct the device away from the face before switching on Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets Manufacturer Contact Information Reckitt Benckiser UK - PO Box 4044, Slough, SL1 0NS See more
